Sandbox_NinjaLineages_HandSignBehaviour_: Classic requires manual keypad hand-sign sequences for common jutsu. Shippuden performs the selected common jutsu's sequence automatically.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_SharinganFirstTomo: Zombie kills required to awaken the Sharingan's first Tomoe.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_SharinganSecondTom: Zombie kills required to awaken the Sharingan's second Tomoe. Values below the first threshold are raised to match it.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_SharinganThirdTomo: Zombie kills required to awaken the Sharingan's third Tomoe. Values below the second threshold are raised to match it.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_NinjaXPGainMultipl: Scales all Ninja XP rewards and daily training budgets.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_NinjaXPCostMultipl: Scales the Ninja XP required to unlock jutsu-tree nodes.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_DebugMode_tooltip: Enables the debug menu options within Shinobi Training.
